commands.title: /help
commands.description: Shows the command list and usage pages. Good for browsing command help within the game.
commands.breakdown: page is optional. Use it to navigate through multiple pages of available commands.

commands.title: /give
commands.breakdown: target = player or selector (@a, @p), item = item ID (e.g., diamond), amount = stack count.

commands.title: /clear
commands.description: Removes items from a player’s inventory.
commands.breakdown: target = who gets cleared, item and amount are optional filters to specify what to remove.

commands.title: /gamemode
commands.breakdown: mode = survival, creative, adventure, or spectator.

commands.title: /teleport
commands.description: Moves entities instantly to a new location or another entity.
commands.breakdown: target = who moves, destination = coordinates (x y z) or another entity name/selector.

commands.title: /kill
commands.breakdown: target can be one player, many mobs, or @s (yourself). Use with caution!

commands.title: /effect
commands.breakdown: effect = status ID (speed, levitation, etc). amplifier increases potency. hideParticles removes visual bubbles.

commands.title: /enchant
commands.description: Adds an enchantment to the item currently in the player’s hand.
commands.breakdown: level is optional. Only works if the item supports the enchantment and player is holding it.

commands.title: /xp
commands.breakdown: amount can be a number. Use suffix 'L' for levels (e.g., 5L).

commands.title: /ability
commands.description: Sets or queries players abilities (like worldbuilder or mayfly).
commands.breakdown: player = target, ability = fly, mute, etc. value = true/false.

commands.title: Mode: Adventure
commands.description: Shortcut to set adventure mode (no block breaking).

commands.title: Mode: Creative
commands.description: Shortcut to set creative mode (infinite blocks/flight).

commands.title: Quick Diamonds
commands.description: Gives the nearest player a full stack of diamonds.
